title: Peppery Dense German Smoked Salmon Stir-fry
description: This gluten-free, one-pot dish features smoky salmon mixed with aromatic spices and vegetables for a peppery, dense flavor profile.

ingredients.name: 200g (7oz) German smoked salmon fillets
ingredients.notes: ensure it's fully defrosted if refrigerated

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the red onion slices and garlic to the skillet. Sauté for about 5 minutes until softened but not browned.
Increase heat to high, add smoked salmon fillets skin-side down, reduce heat slightly and let cook undisturbed for about 3-4 minutes.
Gently toss in dill, lemon juice (if using), and freshly ground black pepper over medium-high heat for another 2-3 minutes until the salmon is cooked through and evenly seasoned.
Fold in chopped parsley just before serving to prevent browning.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish with steamed vegetables.
